summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new resilient market data layer (11 endpoints under /api/market/*). All core functionality working correctly with Finnhub+yfinance integration, in-memory caching with TTL, MongoDB persistence, and stale-on-error fallback mechanism.

minor_issues.issue: Finnhub API occasionally returns null for low_52w and high_52w fields
minor_issues.impact: Non-critical - fields are present in response but may be null depending on upstream data availability
minor_issues.note: This is expected behavior when Finnhub doesn't have 52-week range data. The fallback to yfinance should handle this, but may also return null if data is unavailable.

passed_tests: GET /api/market/health - Returns {status: ok, service: market, provider: finnhub+yfinance}
GET /api/market/quote/AAPL - First call fetches data (cached=false), second call serves from cache (cached=true)
GET /api/market/quote/ZZINVALIDXYZ - Returns 502 with upstream_unavailable error for invalid symbols
GET /api/market/history/AAPL?period=5d&interval=1d - Returns 5 OHLCV bars with all required fields
GET /api/market/batch?symbols=AAPL,MSFT&period=5d - Returns dict with AAPL and MSFT keys, each containing bar data
GET /api/market/summary/US - Returns market summary with summary and status keys
GET /api/market/search?q=apple - Returns quotes (5 items) and news (6 items) lists
GET /api/market/fundamentals/MSFT - Returns income_stmt (47 rows) and analyst_price_targets with mean field
GET /api/market/options/AAPL?expiration=2026-07-02 - Returns calls (63 contracts) and puts (59 contracts)
GET /api/market/screener?type=invalid_type - Handles invalid screener type gracefully with 502 (no 500 crash)
Regression: GET /api/billing/config - Still returns 200 with configured packages
Regression: POST /api/auth/login - Superadmin login still works
Regression: GET /api/news/market - Still returns 20 news items

success_percentage.frontend: N/A (frontend testing skipped as per request)

action_item_for_main_agent: Optional enhancement: Consider adding a fallback mechanism in market_service.py quote() function to ensure low_52w and high_52w are always populated by trying yfinance when Finnhub returns null for these fields. Current implementation is acceptable but could be more robust.
